Title: Add Serilog SQLite sink for agent runtime telemetry
Description:
Serilog is now wired for console, rolling file logs, and Windows EventLog in WebUI.Blazor. Add a SQLite sink so runtime logs are queryable in-process for diagnostics dashboards and loop triage.

Implementation:
1. Add a supported Serilog SQLite sink package to WebUI.Blazor.
2. Configure sink in Program.cs (or appsettings Serilog section) with DB path under logs/.
3. Add schema migration/bootstrap if required by the chosen sink.
4. Verify writes under live run (chat, planning loop, MineBlock failures).
5. Add docs for querying common incidents (LLM null responses, repeated blockNotFound loops).

Acceptance criteria:
- Runtime emits entries to sqlite without crashing when db is locked or unavailable.
- Existing sinks (file + EventLog) remain active.
- At least one troubleshooting query documented for repeated gather loops.
